message:
feat(index,fsfs,fusion): add WAL journaling, catalog module, and searcher hardening

- index/wal.rs (+330 lines): implement write-ahead log (WAL) for
  index operations providing crash recovery guarantees, transaction
  boundaries, and deterministic replay for the index persistence layer
- fsfs/catalog.rs (+214 lines): new catalog module for managing search
  index metadata, schema versioning, and segment lifecycle tracking
- fusion/searcher.rs (+9/-6): harden searcher indexing with bounds
  checks and defensive validation for edge cases in segment merging
- Cargo.toml: dependency version bump to support new WAL module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
